title: Kotasattemma Temple, Nidadavolu

overview.short: Kotasattemma Temple is a Hindu pilgrimage center in Nidadavolu of East Godavari district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.
overview.description: Kotasattemma Temple is a Hindu pilgrimage center in Nidadavolu of East Godavari district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Rajahmundry Urban mandal
topPlaces.description: Rajahmundry Urban mandal, officially known as Rajamahendravaram Urban mandal, is one of the 19 mandals in East Godavari of the state of Andhra Pradesh, India. It has its headquarters at Rajahmundry city, that covers the entire urban mandal.

topPlaces.name: Dowleswaram
topPlaces.description: Dowleswaram is a part of Rajamahendravaram Municipal Corporation (RMC). It also forms a part of Godavari Urban Development Authority.

topPlaces.name: Bommuru
topPlaces.description: Bommuru is a locality in Rajamahendravaram City. It is part of Greater Rajamahendravaram Municipal Corporation (GRMC).

topPlaces.name: Vullithota
topPlaces.description: Vullithota is a village situated in East Godavari district in Rajahmundry Urban, in Andhra Pradesh State.

topPlaces.name: Godavari Bridge
topPlaces.description: The Godavari Bridge or Kovvur–Rajahmundry Bridge is a truss bridge spanning the Godavari River in Rajahmundry, India. It is India's fourth longest road-cum-rail bridge crossing a water body, the first one being the Bogibeel Bridge over the Brahmaputra in Assam, and second is Digha–Sonpur Bridge over the Ganga in Bihar.

topPlaces.name: Gandhipuram, East Godavari
topPlaces.description: Gandhipuram is a locality situated in East Godavari district within Rajahmundry town in Andhra Pradesh State.

topPlaces.name: Rajamahendravaram bus station
topPlaces.description: Rajamahendravaram bus station (formerly Rajahmundry bus station) is a bus station located in Rajahmundry city of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is owned by Andhra Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Godavari River
topPlaces.description: The Godavari (IAST: Godāvarī, IPA: [ɡoːd̪ɑːʋɐɾiː]) is India's second longest river after the Ganges River, and drains the third largest basin in India, covering about 10% of the total geographical area. Its source is in Trimbakeshwar, Nashik, and Maharashtra.

items.note: Rajahmundry Urban mandal, officially known as Rajamahendravaram Urban mandal, is one of the 19 mandals in East Godavari of the state of Andhra Pradesh, India. It has its headquarters at Rajahmundry city, that covers the entire urban mandal.
Dowleswaram is a part of Rajamahendravaram Municipal Corporation (RMC). It also forms a part of Godavari Urban Development Authority.
Bommuru is a locality in Rajamahendravaram City. It is part of Greater Rajamahendravaram Municipal Corporation (GRMC).
Vullithota is a village situated in East Godavari district in Rajahmundry Urban, in Andhra Pradesh State.

The Godavari Bridge or Kovvur–Rajahmundry Bridge is a truss bridge spanning the Godavari River in Rajahmundry, India. It is India's fourth longest road-cum-rail bridge crossing a water body, the first one being the Bogibeel Bridge over the Brahmaputra in Assam, and second is Digha–Sonpur Bridge over the Ganga in Bihar.
Gandhipuram is a locality situated in East Godavari district within Rajahmundry town in Andhra Pradesh State.

Rajamahendravaram bus station (formerly Rajahmundry bus station) is a bus station located in Rajahmundry city of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is owned by Andhra Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation.

The Godavari (IAST: Godāvarī, IPA: [ɡoːd̪ɑːʋɐɾiː]) is India's second longest river after the Ganges River, and drains the third largest basin in India, covering about 10% of the total geographical area. Its source is in Trimbakeshwar, Nashik, and Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kotasattemma Temple, Nidadavolu?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kotasattemma Temple, Nidadavolu is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kotasattemma Temple, Nidadavolu?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajahmundry Airport (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (132 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kotasattemma Temple, Nidadavolu?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kotasattemma Temple, Nidadavolu at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kotasattemma Temple, Nidadavolu?
faq.a: Stays in Kotasattemma Temple, Nidadavolu start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kotasattemma Temple, Nidadavolu?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rajahmundry Urban mandal, Dowleswaram, Bommuru, Vullithota, Godavari Bridge.
